title: Eva for PS2
wikitext:
[]: Eva for PS2?             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun Jul 25, 2004 12:40 pm Have anyone played this?I didn't know anything about it,i just found it and i was wondering if somebody knows,is it going or have been released in Greece?

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Sun Jul 25, 2004 12:58 pm I'm not sure if they're going to release that game outside of Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jul 25, 2004 5:29 pm Evangelion 2 has not been released outside of Japan, and there has been no intention by anyone to bring Evangelion 2 to any other areas. Of those hardcore Eva geeks with Japanese fluency that have played it, none have expressed much adulation for it. Its simply not that big a deal. If anything, it is at times a bit ludicrous and isn't much for new story, nor does it doesn't expand upon the story that much. It provides new answers, however many people are quick to say "no way", as many would disagree with its canonicity. The game isn't really that great, it would be nice if it were to be ported to something like American PS2, and translated into English, but until that happens, or if it doesn't happen, I wouldn't feel bad. Cause I certainly don't. And I say that as a hardcore Eva geek, and a pretty serious video game geek.

[]:             Quote Post by Abaddon » Sun Jul 25, 2004 11:04 pm At this point a release of Eva 2 outside of Japan is unknown. There is a petition to bring the game stateside here [url]http://www.petitiononline.com/evagame/petition.html[/url] I would like to play this game, just for the fun of it. I don't have a chip to play Japanese PS2 games, so an english version of the game would be nice.

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun Jul 25, 2004 11:09 pm I signed it but... I doubt Bandai will even respond unless we can get like 10,000 people to sign this thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jul 26, 2004 1:09 am Dave wrote: I signed it but... I doubt Bandai will even respond unless we can get like 10,000 people to sign this thing.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 26, 2004 1:39 am In terms of math, I don't think you could find 250,000 Eva fans to sign that petition. Hell, even if I got each unique person who has visited this site to sign it, that would only be about ten thousand or so.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jul 26, 2004 4:01 am It would take 250,000 or more fans/people interested in the game and willing to buy it , so that that they could distrubute it it to the english audience , the closest thing u going to get is a pc version ( if u know what I mean)

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Mon Jul 26, 2004 2:15 pm We are never playing this game. Just forget about it.

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Mon Jul 26, 2004 4:26 pm I first read about the game in Newtype. The did a pretty awsome cover story about it, which really brought the hype to me. I thought it was going to be a "choose your own adventure" of sorts, with really cool Eva vs. Angel fights! But the more I hear about it, the more I'm not so sure... I signed the petition. Even if it turns out to be not so great, I'd still buy it! P.S. New avitar is frickkin' awsome!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 26, 2004 5:04 pm Kiel wrote: I first read about the game in Newtype. The did a pretty awsome cover story about it, which really brought the hype to me.

[]: Im a Newibe and this is my first day !!! be nice             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Thu Sep 09, 2004 4:57 pm where do i go to sign this petition? I would like to buy it even tho i would suck worse than Wrath Unleashed (burn burn in hell!) and how do you make the little picture thingys on the side there and the pictures? Could you send me what ever the equevioulent of an instant message is.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Sep 09, 2004 6:06 pm I'm sorry, but NewType's spread was fucking lame. It screamed "Eva is awesome, buy Eva stuff!". It had no real substance, in my opinion. And I don't see the point in having an issue feature a title that will NEVER see the light of day in America. Sure, you can have an article about it, but having it as the cover story is just counter-productive.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 09, 2004 7:20 pm Dark FireStar wrote: where do i go to sign this petition?

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Thu Sep 09, 2004 7:24 pm I hafta agree, the Newtype article didn't have much substance, and it did scream buy Eva stuff. But the pics were cool. then again, you can see even more online. Blah.

[]: Play?             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Sep 14, 2004 4:32 pm where can i get one of these chips that go to the PS2 so you can play foeigen games and is it ilegal
